executives.name: Mary Barra
executives.background: Mary T. Barra has been Chair and CEO of GM since 2016 and 2014, respectively. She has held various leadership positions at GM since 1980, including Executive Vice President, Global Product Development, Purchasing and Supply Chain.

executives.name: Paul Jacobson
executives.background: Paul A. Jacobson is Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of GM. Before joining GM in 2020, he served as CFO of Delta Air Lines.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Mark Reuss
executives.background: Mark L. Reuss has been President of GM since 2019. He has held numerous roles at GM, including Executive Vice President, Global Product Group and Cadillac.

tenure_dates.title: President (Current, 2019–Present); Executive Vice President, Global Product Development, Purchasing and Supply Chain (2013–2019); various other senior roles since 1990.

executives.name: Julian Blissett
executives.background: Julian Blissett is Executive Vice President, Global Manufacturing and Sustainability. He previously served as President of GM China.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Global Manufacturing and Sustainability
Executive Vice President and President, GM China

executives.name: Craig Glidden
executives.background: Craig Glidden is Executive Vice President and General Counsel. He joined GM in 2015 from LyondellBasell.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Counsel
Executive Vice President, Global Public Policy, General Counsel, and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Alicia Boler Davis
executives.background: CEO of Alto Pharmacy. Former Senior Vice President of Global Customer Fulfillment at Amazon.

executives.name: Aneel Bhusri
executives.background: Co-founder and Executive Chair of Workday, Inc.

executives.name: Brice Hill
executives.background: Brice Hill is Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Applied Materials, joining in March 2022. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Xilinx, Inc. and spent 25 years at Intel Corporation in various finance and strategy leadership positions.

executives.name: Devin Wenig
executives.background: Former President and CEO of eBay Inc.

executives.name: Gerald Johnson
executives.background: Executive Vice President, Global Manufacturing, General Motors Company.

executives.name: Jan Tighe
executives.background: Retired Vice Admiral, United States Navy.

executives.name: Joanne Crevoiserat
executives.background: CEO of Tapestry, Inc.

executives.name: Jon McNeill
executives.background: Mr. McNeill has served as a member of the Board since 2021. He is the CEO and co-founder of DVx Ventures and previously served as the COO of Lyft and President of Global Sales, Delivery and Service at Tesla.

executives.name: Joseph Jimenez
executives.background: Former CEO of Novartis AG.

executives.name: Judith Miscik
executives.background: Former CEO and Vice Chairman of Kissinger Associates, Inc.

executives.name: Kent Kresa
executives.background: Mr. Kresa has served as a member of our Board since May 2022. He is the Chairman Emeritus of Northrop Grumman Corporation.

executives.name: Linda Gooden
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President, Information Systems & Global Solutions of Lockheed Martin Corporation.

executives.name: Luca Maestri
executives.background: Luca Maestri is Apple’s senior vice president and Chief Financial Officer reporting to CEO Tim Cook. As CFO, Luca oversees the accounting, business support, financial planning and analysis, treasury, real estate, information systems, internal audit and tax functions at Apple. Luca joined Apple in 2013 as vice president of Finance and corporate controller, and has worked closely with Apple’s senior leadership since his arrival.

tenure_dates.title: Various finance and operating roles (including General Motors Europe)

executives.name: Margaret Whitman
executives.background: U.S. Ambassador to Kenya; former CEO of Hewlett Packard Enterprise.

executives.name: Mark Tatum
executives.background: Deputy Commissioner and COO of the National Basketball Association.

tenure_dates.title: Director (Member of the Board of Directors)

executives.name: Patricia Russo
executives.background: Former CEO of Alcatel-Lucent.

executives.name: Thomas Schoewe
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Walmart Inc.

executives.name: Wesley Bush
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation.
